'''Elam'shak''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] member of the [[Clan Shak]] and was the brother of [[Koh'shak]], [[Troa'shak]] and [[Wrou'shak]]. He served as the [[Fan Master]] at the [[Kala'uun Starport]].
